overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game depicting a character walking through a cotton plantation during golden hour. The character passes a wooden barn and approaches a prisoner working in the fields, with atmospheric haze and warm sunlight creating a rustic, historical atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: cotton plantation field with approaching barn

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path through cotton field toward large wooden barn

entered.detail: rows of cotton plants with white bolls stretching across the field
narrow dirt trail running through the middle of the cotton field
large weathered wooden barn with dark roof visible in the distance
tall wooden watchtower structure silhouetted against the sky
sparse oak trees dotting the landscape around the field

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a cotton plantation field along a dirt path, approaching a large wooden barn in the distance. The morning sun casts long shadows through the atmospheric haze, with a watchtower visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: cotton plantation path alongside stone wall

events.description: camera turns slightly right to follow path alongside stone wall

agents.ego_description: continuing along path past the barn, moving deeper into the plantation alongside a stone wall

entered.detail: low stone wall running parallel to the dirt path
large two-story plantation house with dark roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character passes the wooden barn and continues along the dirt path, now with a stone wall on the right. A large plantation manor becomes visible in the distance on the right as the character moves deeper into the fields.

events.description: approaching prisoner in striped uniform working in cotton field
prisoner stands up from bending position among cotton plants

agents.ego_description: walking toward a prisoner bending over in the cotton field, observing as the prisoner stands up and turns around

notable_agents.action: prisoner in striped uniform bending over working in cotton field, then standing up to face the camera

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a prisoner wearing a striped uniform who is working among the cotton plants. The prisoner stands up as the camera draws near, with the plantation manor visible in the background and morning mist hovering over the fields.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy cotton plantation that transitions from a wide view of rural structures to an intimate encounter with a laborer. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path toward a distant wooden barn, with a watchtower standing to the left under the long shadows of the morning sun. As the character passes the barn, the path is flanked by a stone wall on the right, and the view expands to reveal a large plantation manor emerging in the distance. The scene then shifts focus as the camera draws closer to a prisoner in a striped uniform working among the cotton plants. Finally, the prisoner stands up to face the character while the manor remains visible through the lingering morning mist hovering over the fields.
